"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.iif = void 0; var defer_1 = require("./defer"); function iif(condition, trueResult, falseResult) { return defer_1.defer(function () { return (condition() ? trueResult : falseResult); }); } exports.iif = iif; //# sourceMappingURL=iif.js.map
